##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/customer/queryPage 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/customer/queryPage 
 ## 接口描述 
分页查询客户信息 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"start","required":true,"label":"%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B%E6%9D%A1%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%20%E4%BE%8B%E5%A6%82%EF%BC%9Alimit%3D10%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E7%AC%AC%E4%B8%80%E9%A1%B5%E7%9A%84%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B%E6%9D%A1%E6%95%B0%E4%B8%BA0%EF%BC%8C%E7%AC%AC%E4%BA%8C%E9%A1%B5%E7%9A%84%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B%E6%9D%A1%E6%95%B0%E4%B8%BA10"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"limit","required":true,"label":"%E6%AF%8F%E9%A1%B5%E6%9D%A1%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"10","desc":"%20%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%A7%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E6%AF%8F%E9%A1%B5100%E6%9D%A1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"query","required":false,"label":"%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%9D%A1%E4%BB%B6","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customerIdList","label":"%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%22CUS0000%22%5D"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customerStatus","required":false,"label":"%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%200%EF%BC%9A%E5%81%9C%E7%94%A8%0A1%EF%BC%9A%E5%90%AF%E7%94%A8"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"globalSearch","required":false,"label":"%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E3%80%81%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%E5%85%B3%E9%94%AE%E5%AD%97","exampleValue":"%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7","desc":"%20%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E3%80%81%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%E6%A8%A1%E7%B3%8A%E6%90%9C%E7%B4%A2"}}]}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数

eId","required":true,"exampleValue":"V0002","label":"%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E5%AF%B9%E5%BA%94%E7%9A%84%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"typeNam","required":true,"exampleValue":"%E5%8C%97%E4%B8%9C","label":"%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E5%AF%B9%E5%BA%94%E7%9A%84%E5%90%8D%E5%AD%97","maxLength":"100"}}]}]}]}]},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","required":true,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"SUC0000","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":true,"label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":true,"label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":""}}]}]</restparamstable> ## 接口调用示例 
 #### 请求报文
```json
{
    "start": 0,
    "limit": 10,
    "query": {
        "customerIdList": [
            "CUS00000"
        ]
    }
}
```

## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|解决方案|
  | --- | --- | --- |
  | SUC0000| 成功| 成功|
  | EROOR1| 系统异常| 系统错误，联系管理员处理|
  | EROOR2| 业务执行错误| 业务执行错误按提示修改入参后重试|
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/customer/queryPage

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/customer/queryPage

接口描述

分页查询客户信息

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"start","required":true,"label":"%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B%E6%9D%A1%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%20%E4%BE%8B%E5%A6%82%EF%BC%9Alimit%3D10%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E7%AC%AC%E4%B8%80%E9%A1%B5%E7%9A%84%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B%E6%9D%A1%E6%95%B0%E4%B8%BA0%EF%BC%8C%E7%AC%AC%E4%BA%8C%E9%A1%B5%E7%9A%84%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B%E6%9D%A1%E6%95%B0%E4%B8%BA10"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"limit","required":true,"label":"%E6%AF%8F%E9%A1%B5%E6%9D%A1%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"10","desc":"%20%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%A7%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E6%AF%8F%E9%A1%B5100%E6%9D%A1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"query","required":false,"label":"%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%9D%A1%E4%BB%B6","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customerIdList","label":"%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%22CUS0000%22%5D"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customerStatus","required":false,"label":"%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%200%EF%BC%9A%E5%81%9C%E7%94%A8%0A1%EF%BC%9A%E5%90%AF%E7%94%A8"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"globalSearch","required":false,"label":"%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E3%80%81%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%E5%85%B3%E9%94%AE%E5%AD%97","exampleValue":"%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7","desc":"%20%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E3%80%81%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%E6%A8%A1%E7%B3%8A%E6%90%9C%E7%B4%A2"}}]}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]}

错误码说明

错误码 错误信息 解决方案
SUC0000 成功 成功
EROOR1 系统异常 系统错误，联系管理员处理
EROOR2 业务执行错误 业务执行错误按提示修改入参后重试
